name: Color Spin Puzzle
description: COLOR SPIN is a super arcade game with simple rules : Bounce the ball on the same color in the circle. You just need to spin the wheel on the right or the left to match the color at the bottom of the circle to the color of the ball. Very easy to play but very hard to master and reach high scores! Game Features: - Endless gameplay - Easy controls - Challenge your friends in the leaderboard with the best highscore
instructions: Use only one or two fingers to play to spin the color wheel Try to bounce the ball as many time as possible
